channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: ‘US trying to find its way out of MoU with Iran’
item.description: Bahrain and Kuwait have condemned Iran’s retaliatory attacks after a second day of US strikes on Iran.

item.title: Iraq security forces arrest several officials in anticorruption crackdown
item.description: Large-scale operation carried out at dawn in Green Zone and several neighbourhoods in Baghdad, security source says.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Round of 32 bracket, schedule, predictions, Iran’s exit
item.description: Knockout matches begin with South Africa vs Canada as Iran exit, Africa make history, Messi-Ronaldo final hopes rise.

item.title: Iran attacks Kuwait and Bahrain in response to US strikes
item.description: US-Iran deal under strain as Kuwait and Bahrain condemn Iranian attacks in response to US strikes.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 17: Messi breaks record as Algeria and DR Congo advance
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: South Africa vs Canada: World Cup 2026 – prediction, team news and lineups
item.description: Neither South Africa nor Canada has reached the knockout rounds of a World Cup before, but now a last-16 place awaits.

item.title: DR Congo fans celebrate reaching World Cup knockout stage
item.description: DR Congo fans are celebrating after their team secured a historic place in the World Cup knockout stage.

item.title: ‘Between pain and fear’: Gaza children bear cost of ongoing Israeli attacks
item.description: Suffering of Gaza's children continues unabated due to Israeli attacks despite 'ceasefire' reached in October 2025.

item.title: Iran bow out of World Cup: Late drama ends Team Melli’s knockout dream
item.description: Austria's 3-3 draw with Algeria ultimately decides Iran's fate as Team Melli crash out of the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Polls open in New Caledonia’s first provincial elections since 2019
item.description: The New Zealand public broadcaster reports that about 2,500 police officers were deployed to secure and monitor polling stations.

item.title: In pictures: Race against time to rescue Venezuela earthquake survivors
item.description: Time is running out in Venezuela's race to locate survivors as experts highlight the crucial 72-hour rescue window.

item.title: Iran war day 121: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait as US strikes near Hormuz
item.description: US strikes Iran for a second day near Strait of Hormuz as Bahrain sounds sirens and Kuwait activates air defences.

item.title: Which teams are in World Cup last-32 knockouts, and what is the schedule?
item.description: All the qualified teams and match schedule for the round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which begins on Sunday.

item.title: World Cup Round of 32: Which teams qualified or exited the tournament
item.description: The FIFA World Cup knockout stage has begun with 32 teams progressing and 16 eliminated from the 2026 edition.

item.title: Venezuelan earthquake death toll rises amid increasingly dire search
item.description: The death toll from Venezuela’s twin earthquakes has reached 1,430, with an estimated 51,000 people still missing.

item.title: Between English and mother tongue: Kenya’s education language dilemma
item.description: Students in Kenya say mother tongue improves learning, but English still dominates education and work.

item.title: World Cup: Messi sends Argentina top, England to face DR Congo, Iran out
item.description: Lionel Messi scored his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup, Harry Kane sent England top of their group, and Iran exited.

item.title: Gulf countries attacked after US launches second round of strikes on Iran
item.description: Gulf countries attacked after US launches second round of strikes on Iran.

item.title: Colombia top World Cup 2026 group after breathless 0-0 draw with Portugal
item.description: Colombia book last 32 clash with Ghana, while Portugal will face Croatia in the first knockout stage.

item.title: Anger grows in Venezuela as citizens blocked from aiding earthquake rescue
item.description: Anger is mounting in Venezuela after the military barred citizens from entering zones devastated by the earthquakes.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait after US bombs Iranian coast
item.description: President Trump threatens to 'militarily complete the job' as the US strikes Sirik and Qeshm Island over ship attacks.

item.title: US launches second night of strikes on Iran after ship hit by drone
item.description: The attacks come after an alleged Iranian drone struck another commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday.

item.title: Videos show Israeli settlers trying to seize house in occupied West Bank
item.description: Videos show Israeli settlers trying to seize a house under construction in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Donald Trump nominates ex-state trooper Lance Schroyer as ICE director
item.description: The immigration enforcement agency has been without a Senate-confirmed director since 2017, during Trump's first term.

item.title: Colombia vs Portugal 0-0: FIFA World Cup 2026 – as it happened
item.description: All the updates from a lively but goalless game, as Colombia top Group K, while Portugal finish second.
